name: IEEE TALE 2026 — IEEE International Conference on Teaching, Assessment, and Learning for Engineering
subset_axis: Engineering / STEM students subset of preprint k=10 primary pool, plus matched secondary-outcome studies where engineering majors are reported.
novel_analysis: Machine-learning predictive layer (Logistic Regression / Random Forest / XGBoost) trained at the study-level on extracted features (modality, era, sample size, RoB) to predict whether a study reports a non-null Big Five effect; SHAP value interpretation; fairlearn-based fairness audit across region/era subgroups. NOT in preprint.
notes: IEEE TALE accepts education-research papers with engineering-education focus. Author has prior IEEE Xplore publication (P2, 2025).
